String(params.domain) : "@example.com"; if (domain.charAt(0) !== "@") { domain = "@" + domain; } domain = domain.toLowerCase(); normalizedValue = String(value).toLowerCase(); if (normalizedValue.length < domain.length || normalizedValue.substring(normalizedValue.length - domain.length) !== domain) { return [{"policyRequirement":"EMAIL_DOMAIN"}]; } return []; }

addPolicy({"policyId":"account-status-valid","policyExec":"accountStatusValidPolicy","policyRequirements":["VALID_ACCOUNT_STATUS"]}); function accountStatusValidPolicy(fullObject, value, params, property) { var allowed; var i; if (value === null || typeof value === "undefined" || String(value).length === 0) { return []; } allowed = (params && params.values && params.values.length) ? params.values : ["active", "inactive"]; for (i = 0; i < allowed.length; i++) { if (String(value) === String(allowed[i])) { return []; } } return [{"policyRequirement":"VALID_ACCOUNT_STATUS"}]; }
